caption: A woman with blonde hair tied back is speaking in a professional setting against a plain, light-colored wall. She is wearing a dark navy blazer over a red top. A small microphone is attached to her blazer near her chest. To her side, a clear plastic water bottle sits on a surface. The logo "mediasite" appears in the top left corner of the scene. As the sequence progresses, the woman uses hand gestures to emphasize her speech. She begins with her hands clasped in front of her, then moves them outward to gesture with open palms. In one instance, she briefly raises her right hand toward her shoulder before continuing to gesture with both hands as she speaks. The background and her attire remain constant throughout the frames.
